case_title: WALTER CROX ET AL VS. RONALD NAKEEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-06-2019 CONTINUED TO MAY-08-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROX, WALTER DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY CROX, BARBARA DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY AS TO DEFENDANT NAKEEN, RONALD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-26-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-26-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-03-2018

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62711000), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROX, WALTER DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY CROX, BARBARA DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY SERVED OCT-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-16-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT NAKEEN, RONALD

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $322.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62719076) AS TO DEFENDANT NAKEEN, RONALD

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62734347) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROX, WALTER DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY CROX, BARBARA DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-26-2018 CONTINUED TO FEB-06-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROX, WALTER DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY CROX, BARBARA DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAKEEN, RONALD $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $322.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,572.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62966782)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CROX, WALTER DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY CROX, BARBARA DBA COVENANT FUNERAL SERVICES & CREMATORY AS TO DEFENDANT NAKEEN, RONALD
